title: Senior Financial Analyst - AU Small Finance Bank Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred
company: AU Small Finance Bank Capital India

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - AU Small Finance Bank Capital India - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
AU Small Finance Bank Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AU Small Finance Bank Capital India:
AU Small Finance Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AU Small Finance Bank Capital India!
